programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Wanda's latest crush gives her his number; Brent questions his sense of smell; the Ruby gets a touch up.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The stabbing death of a gang leader in a prison scuffle has Briscoe and Green looking at both inmates and corrections officers as possible suspects.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Long Walk
programme.desc: Teens participate in a grueling high-stakes contest where they must continuously walk or be shot by a member of their military escort.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Oh, Hi!
programme.desc: Iris is enjoying her first romantic getaway with Isaac, until he tells her he's not interested in a serious relationship.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Adulthood
programme.desc: When siblings Noah and Megan find a long-buried corpse in their parents' basement, they stumble into a wildly escalating web of crime, cover-ups and murder. The deeper they dig, the harder it becomes to escape.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: All the Old Knives
programme.desc: When the CIA discovers one of its agents leaked information that cost more than 100 people their lives, veteran operative Henry Pelham is assigned to root out the mole with his former lover and colleague Celia Harrison.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: White Noise
programme.desc: Ava's debilitating hyper-sensitivity to sound is becoming unliveable. When an attempt at suicide fails, she pleads with her doctor to enrol her in an experimental trial involving an anechoic chamber: the world's quietest room.

programme.title: Subjects of Desire
programme.desc: Exploring the cultural shift in North American beauty standards toward embracing Black female aesthetics and features while exposing the deliberate and often dangerous portrayals of Black women in the media.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Elli and Her Monster Team
programme.desc: A homeless ghost seeking belonging at a Ghost Train draws unwanted outside attention, forcing her and its monster residents to embark on a quest to save their home and her chance at finding family.

programme.title: Air Bud
programme.desc: Diffident in the wake of his father's death, high schooler Josh (Kevin Zegers) struggles to adapt to his new home in Washington state. That all changes, however, when he signs up to be the school basketball team's manager and discovers that his pet dog Bud, a stray golden retriever he took in, can play the sport amazingly well. After Bud joins the team, Josh's life brightens considerably, until the dog's former owner Norm Snively (Michael Jeter) returns in hopes of reclaiming the pooch.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Air Bud: Golden Receiver
programme.desc: Teenager Josh (Kevin Zegers) just became the legal owner of his basketball-playing dog, Buddy. But now Buddy is playing football, too, thanks to veterinarian Patrick Sullivan (Gregory Harrison), who happens to be the new boyfriend of Josh's mom. Unfortunately, Josh and Patrick don't get along too well. But, when a couple of Russians (Nora Dunn, Perry Anzilotti) see Buddy playing on TV and decide to kidnap him for their circus, the two must band together to find the dog and save him.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Under the Boardwalk
programme.desc: Two crabs embark on an epic journey to get home after a storm sweeps them away. Their courage soon unites their families, paving the way for great summers to come.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Voyagers
programme.desc: With the future of the human race at stake, a group of young men and women -- bred for intelligence and obedience -- embark on an expedition to colonize a distant planet. When they uncover disturbing secrets about the mission, they defy their training and begin to explore their most primitive natures. As life on the ship descends into chaos, they soon become consumed by fear, lust and an insatiable hunger for power.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Never Say Never Again
programme.desc: An aging James Bond (Sean Connery) makes an uncharacteristic mistake during a routine training mission, leading M (Edward Fox) to believe that the legendary British Intelligence spy is now past his prime. M indefinitely suspends Bond from active duty. However, when SPECTRE member Fatima Bush (Barbara Carrera) and her fellow terrorists successfully steal two nuclear missiles from the U.S. military, M must reinstate Bond, as he is the only agent who can beat SPECTRE at their own game of espionage.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Forge
programme.desc: A year out of high school with no plans for his future, a boy is challenged by his single mom and a successful businessman to start charting a better course for his life. Through the prayers of his mother and biblical discipleship from his new mentor, he begins discovering God's purpose for his life is so much more than he could hope for or imagine.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Transplant
programme.sub-title: All I Have Is How I Feel
programme.desc: Bash and Mags support each other through new challenges while treating an older couple who show up at the hospital glued together; Theo is called out by Liz Bergeron about his repeated inability to follow hospital rules.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Emma and Karen look for a suitable gift to send their twin town in Japan; Wanda attempts to become the advice giving bartender.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Oscar is asked to be a school bus driver for the day; the kids may not be the only ones who need a lesson in good behavior.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A murder suspect flees to Israel and may be protected from extradition by Israel's Law of Return.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Love Island: Beyond the Villa
programme.sub-title: Bye Bye Bryan, Hello New York
programme.desc: Amaya and Bryan meet for the first time since their breakup; Taylor visits Clarke in North Carolina; Amaya searches for a new apartment; the crew plans a group trip to Palm Springs as Charlie returns to the fold.

programme.title: Love Island: Beyond the Villa
programme.sub-title: The British Are Coming... to Palm Springs
programme.desc: Chris, Bryan and Belle-A host the group in Palm Springs; Charlie and Hannah hash things out in front of the group; Belle-A tries to play peacemaker but finds herself at odds with the girls; Iris throws TJ a surprise '80s-themed birthday party.

programme.title: Club Cumming
programme.sub-title: Make Crafts, Not War (or the Right to Bear Glue Guns)
programme.desc: Michelle gets assistance from Club Cumming's queen of crafting, Brini, in creating a headdress, while comedian Jake helps her boost her confidence on the mic; Daphne, Michelle and Cumming work together to build a kissing booth.

programme.title: The Family McMullen
programme.desc: A close-knit family navigates life's ups and downs, confronting personal struggles and evolving bonds. As they face unexpected hurdles, their connections are tested, revealing the complexities of love, loyalty and growth within a family.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Drive Back Home
programme.desc: In the winter of 1970, a cantankerous, small town plumber from rural New Brunswick, must drive his beat-up work truck 1000 miles to Toronto to get his estranged, gay brother out of jail after being arrested for having sex in a public park. The two men are then forced to drive back home together at the behest of their hard-nosed mother before they kill each other.

programme.title: The Housemaid
programme.desc: Hoping for a fresh start, a young woman becomes a live-in maid for a wealthy couple who harbor sinister secrets.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Merry Swissmas
programme.desc: While spending Christmastime with her mother in Switzerland, an architect meets a single father who shows her how to open herself up to love and forgiveness during the holiday season.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: PAW Patrol: The Movie
programme.desc: When their biggest rival, Humdinger, starts wreaking havoc as the mayor of Adventure City, Ryder and everyone's favorite heroic pups kick into high gear to face the challenge. Armed with exciting new gadgets and gear, the PAW Patrol joins forces with a savvy dachshund to save the citizens of Adventure City.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: PAW Patrol: The Mighty Movie
programme.desc: The PAW Patrol pups magically gain superpowers after a meteor strikes Adventure City. However, things take a turn for the worse when Humdinger and a mad scientist steal their powers and turn themselves into supervillains. As the team springs into action to save the city, Skye soon learns that even the smallest pup can make the biggest difference.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Amazing Maurice
programme.desc: Maurice is a streetwise ginger cat who comes up with a money-making scam by befriending a group of talking rats. However, when Maurice and the rodents reach the town of Bad Blintz, their little con soon goes down the drain.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Flamin' Hot
programme.desc: Richard Montanez, the son of a Mexican immigrant, was a janitor at Frito-Lay when he came up with the idea for Flamin' Hot Cheetos. His creation, inspired by the flavors of his community, revitalized Frito-Lay and disrupted the food industry.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Christmas Unfiltered
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, Becky wishes that her family would truly hear her. All of her thoughts and frustrations begin to spill out as she inadvertently starts telling everyone what she really thinks.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: One Bad Apple: A Hannah Swensen Mystery
programme.desc: Hannah meets a new side of law and order as she investigates a murder.

programme.title: All Light, Everywhere
programme.desc: Filmmaker Theo Anthony offers a far-ranging look at the biases in how people see things, focusing on the recorded image.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board

programme.title: Transplant
programme.desc: Bash treats a man injured in a car accident who was saved by the woman who hit him; Devi decides to fight to hold on to the department; in a moment where it is most needed, a former member of the York Memorial team returns.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Brent meets a new member of his extended family; Karen helps Wanda showcase her math skills; Ruby makes menu changes.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Oscar tries to catch a mouse; Brent and Hank invent a new game.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A former Black Panther accused of murdering a Caucasian police officer questions Detective Green's integrity while a politically charged trial ensues.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: One Night in Miami
programme.desc: On the night of Feb. 25, 1964, in Miami, Cassius Clay joins Jim Brown, Sam Cooke and Malcolm X, and they discuss the responsibility of being successful black men during the civil rights movement.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
